metadata.name: Uptimekuma
metadata.description: Self-hosted uptime monitoring tool with support for HTTP(s), TCP, ping, DNS, and more. Provides a clean dashboard and customizable notifications.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Self-hosted uptime monitoring tool with support for HTTP(s), TCP, ping, DNS, and more. Provides a clean dashboard and customizable notifications.

## How to Use
This template renders `compose.yaml` as a file.

1. Decide on service names, ports, volumes, credentials, and optional integrations before rendering the stack.
2. Fill in the required variables first, then enable optional sections such as Traefik, metrics, or extra services only when needed.
3. Render the Compose project, review the generated files, and start it with Docker Compose in the target directory.

## Variable Guide
### General
- `service_name`: Service Name; optional; default: uptimekuma.
- `container_name`: Container Name; optional; default: uptimekuma.
- `volumes_version`: Volumes version; optional; default: latest.

## References
- [Uptime Kuma](https://uptime.kuma.pet/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/louislam/uptime-kuma)

variables.name: container_name
variables.title: Container Name
variables.description: Name to use for the container.

variables.name: volumes_version
variables.title: Volumes version
variables.description: Value used for the general settings.
